title: Kalhatty Falls
tagline: Kalhatty Falls — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kalhatti Falls also called as Bird Watcher's Falls is a tourist spot near Ooty, The Nilgiris, Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Kalhatti Falls also called as Bird Watcher's Falls is a tourist spot near Ooty, The Nilgiris, Tamil Nadu. These falls are about 13 km (8.1 mi) from Ooty, on the Ooty to Mysore Road or Sigur Ghat Road, It is situated at an elevation of about 1,600 m (5,200 ft) in the Sigur Plateau. This place is rich in bird life. Wild animals such as deer, wild buffalo and sambhar come to drink water.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Hullathy
topPlaces.description: Hullathy (also Hullathi) is a Gram Panchayat and village in the Nilgiris district, Tamil Nadu, India. The Gram Panchayat is responsible for a total of 32 villages with a population of 9,187, covering an area of 2,729.18 ha (6,744.0 acres).

topPlaces.name: Sholur
topPlaces.description: Sholur is a panchayat town in The Nilgiris district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Halatty Manithalatty
topPlaces.description: Halatty Manthalatty is a village in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, under the Nilgiris District. Halatty Manthalatty is also the name given to a range of mountains spread across the states of Tamil Nadu as well as Karnataka and Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kamaraj Sagar Dam
topPlaces.description: The Kamaraj Sagar Dam (also known as Sandynalla reservoir) is in the Nilgiris district of Tamil Nadu state in India. It is located at a distance of 10 km from the Ooty bus stand.

topPlaces.name: Ooty Golf Course
topPlaces.description: Ooty Golf Course is located in the town of Ooty in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The golf course is set at an altitude of 2194 metres.

topPlaces.name: Lok Bhavan, Ooty
topPlaces.description: Lok Bhavan formerly Raj Bhavan (translation: Government House) of Ooty is the Summer residence of the Governor of Tamil Nadu R. N. Ravi, It is located in the city of Ooty, Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Government Botanical Garden
topPlaces.description: The Government Botanical Garden is a botanical garden in Udhagamandalam, near Coimbatore (Ooty), Tamil Nadu state, India laid out in 1848. The gardens, divided into several sections, cover an area of around 22 hectares (54 acres), and lie on the lower slopes of Doddabetta peak.

topPlaces.name: St. Stephen's Church, Udhagamandalam
topPlaces.description: St. Stephen's Church is located on the road to Mysore in Ooty, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Hullathy (also Hullathi) is a Gram Panchayat and village in the Nilgiris district, Tamil Nadu, India. The Gram Panchayat is responsible for a total of 32 villages with a population of 9,187, covering an area of 2,729.18 ha (6,744.0 acres).
Sholur is a panchayat town in The Nilgiris district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Halatty Manthalatty is a village in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, under the Nilgiris District. Halatty Manthalatty is also the name given to a range of mountains spread across the states of Tamil Nadu as well as Karnataka and Kerala.
The Kamaraj Sagar Dam (also known as Sandynalla reservoir) is in the Nilgiris district of Tamil Nadu state in India. It is located at a distance of 10 km from the Ooty bus stand.
Ooty Golf Course is located in the town of Ooty in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The golf course is set at an altitude of 2194 metres.
Lok Bhavan formerly Raj Bhavan (translation: Government House) of Ooty is the Summer residence of the Governor of Tamil Nadu R. N. Ravi, It is located in the city of Ooty, Tamil Nadu.

The Government Botanical Garden is a botanical garden in Udhagamandalam, near Coimbatore (Ooty), Tamil Nadu state, India laid out in 1848. The gardens, divided into several sections, cover an area of around 22 hectares (54 acres), and lie on the lower slopes of Doddabetta peak.
St. Stephen's Church is located on the road to Mysore in Ooty, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kalhatty Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kalhatty Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kalhatty Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (64 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kalhatty Falls?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kalhatty Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kalhatty Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Kalhatty Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kalhatty Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Hullathy, Sholur, Halatty Manithalatty, Kamaraj Sagar Dam, Ooty Golf Course.
